response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and spoken dialogue phonetically match the Japanese reference materials and on-screen text.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference lyrics for the song '直向エントロピー' and performed manual transcription and translation for the subsequent talk segment.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset times. Pauses between verses and within speech are carefully respected to avoid early cutoffs or cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 想像していた
subtitles.english: I had imagined...

subtitles.original: その染まった世に
subtitles.english: into that stained world,

subtitles.original: うまく笑えない
subtitles.english: I cannot smile properly.

subtitles.original: だけどそれ以上に
subtitles.english: But even more than that,

subtitles.original: 世界は優しくて
subtitles.english: the world is so kind.

subtitles.original: いつか風が生まれた
subtitles.english: Someday, a wind was born.

subtitles.original: 足跡が始まる場所
subtitles.english: The place where footprints begin.

subtitles.original: あの日の荷物持って 帰って
subtitles.english: Carrying the baggage of that day, I return.

subtitles.original: 駆け出したとしても ここに来るんだろう
subtitles.english: Even if I ran out, I would probably end up here.

subtitles.original: この景色も この声も
subtitles.english: This scenery, this voice,

subtitles.original: 私を彩る全て
subtitles.english: everything that colors me.

subtitles.original: 本音なんて まだわからないけど
subtitles.english: Though I still don't know my true feelings,

subtitles.original: ただ風の吹くままに
subtitles.english: I'll just go as the wind blows.

subtitles.original: ねぇ いつから気づいてたの？
subtitles.english: Hey, since when did you notice?

subtitles.original: まるで私のこと全部お見通しで
subtitles.english: It's like you saw right through me.

subtitles.original: 苦し紛れにごまかした嘘も
subtitles.english: Even the lies I used to scramble by...

subtitles.original: 君にはバレてたのかな？
subtitles.english: Did you see right through those too?

subtitles.original: 平凡で退屈であくび混じりで
subtitles.english: Ordinary, boring, and mixed with yawns,

subtitles.original: 変哲のないありふれている時間
subtitles.english: those completely mundane moments.

subtitles.original: 想像していただけじゃ何も変わらない
subtitles.english: Just imagining things changes nothing.

subtitles.original: だけどそれ以上に
subtitles.english: But even more than that,

subtitles.original: 予測してた以上に ほら
subtitles.english: even more than I expected, look!

subtitles.original: 新しい風が吹いてきて
subtitles.english: A new wind starts to blow.

subtitles.original: 不器用な自分がやけに愛おしく思えたんだ
subtitles.english: My clumsy self felt strangely endearing to me.

subtitles.original: あぁ
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: いつか風が止んで
subtitles.english: Someday, the wind will stop,

subtitles.original: 足跡が途切れた場所
subtitles.english: at the place where the footprints fade.

subtitles.original: 落とし物探して 拾って 見つけ出せたから
subtitles.english: Searching for lost things, picking them up, because I found them...

subtitles.original: ここにいるんだろう
subtitles.english: I am probably here.

subtitles.original: そっと 髪がなびく
subtitles.english: Softly, my hair flutters.

subtitles.original: いつか風が夢見た
subtitles.english: Someday, the wind dreamed

subtitles.original: 青空と交わる場所
subtitles.english: of the place where it meets the blue sky.

subtitles.original: 回り道選んで 迷って つまずいたとしても
subtitles.english: Even if I choose detours, get lost, and stumble,

subtitles.original: そこへ行くんだろう
subtitles.english: I will go there.

subtitles.original: この景色も この声も
subtitles.english: This scenery, this voice,

subtitles.original: 私を彩る全て
subtitles.english: everything that colors me.

subtitles.original: 等身大の手で握りしめて
subtitles.english: I'll hold it tight with my true self.

subtitles.original: 想像以上にもっと自由な速度で
subtitles.english: At a pace even more free than imagined.

subtitles.original: 方向なんてまだわからないけど
subtitles.english: I still don't know the direction yet,

subtitles.original: ただ風の吹くままに
subtitles.english: but I'll just go as the wind blows.

subtitles.original: はい！というわけでありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, thank you very much!

subtitles.original: よいしょ。みんなしっかり忘れてると思うけど、今日これから記念撮影します！
subtitles.english: Up we go. I'm sure you all completely forgot, but we're going to take a commemorative photo now!

subtitles.original: そう、お土産があるって言ったっしょ？
subtitles.english: That's right, I told you there would be a souvenir, right?

subtitles.original: これこれ、あ、ちょっと待って、マジで自撮り棒…これリハーサルでめっちゃ練習したのに…
subtitles.english: Here it is. Ah, wait a minute, seriously, this selfie stick... even though I practiced so much in rehearsal...

subtitles.original: 自撮り棒下手…あ、いい感じいい感じ。カシャ。
subtitles.english: I'm so bad at using selfie sticks... Oh, this looks good. Click!

subtitles.original: よし、いけてそういけてそう。オッケー！
subtitles.english: Alright, looks like it worked. Okay!

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで、みなさん、今日お土産ありって言いましたね？
subtitles.english: Yes! So, everyone, I did say there would be a souvenir today, right?

subtitles.original: そうなんです。今日撮った、今この風真がね、自撮り棒で撮った写真が…
subtitles.english: That's right. The photo I just took with the selfie stick...

subtitles.original: コンビニで！なんとプリントアウトできます！すすごい！
subtitles.english: Can actually be printed out at convenience stores! Wow!

subtitles.original: はい。こちらですね、対象店舗、ファミリーマートさん、ローソンさん、ミニストップさんで
subtitles.english: Yes. It's available at participating FamilyMart, Lawson, and Ministop stores,

subtitles.original: 本日21時から、えーネットで事前購入ができます。
subtitles.english: and you can purchase it online starting at 9 PM today.

subtitles.original: お値段がですね、税込み300円とのことでの。
subtitles.english: The price is 300 yen (tax included).

subtitles.original: 印刷できるのは、えー明日の6月19日、えー20時までとなっております。
subtitles.english: You can print it out until tomorrow, June 19th, at 8 PM.

subtitles.original: 写真にはですね、複製手書きメッセージ、あのこの後書きますんで、はい。
subtitles.english: And yes, I'll write a replica handwritten message on the photo after this.

subtitles.original: どんな写真が撮れているか、ちょっと写真下手くそでも怒らないでね？
subtitles.english: Please don't be mad if I'm bad at taking photos, okay?

subtitles.original: あの内容は買ってから確認してください。
subtitles.english: Please check the content after you buy it.

subtitles.original: いや凄いよね。ちょっといち早く皆さんの元に、なんか手元に残るライブのね、お土産が用意できればということで
subtitles.english: Isn't that great? I wanted to quickly provide you all with a tangible souvenir from the live,

subtitles.original: 今回やらせていただきました。お土産あります！
subtitles.english: which is why we decided to do this. We have souvenirs!
